allow: PowerShell($src = "C:\\xampp\\htdocs\\ecommerce\\_lvtmp"; $dst = "C:\\xampp\\htdocs\\ecommerce"; Get-ChildItem -Force -Path $src | ForEach-Object { Move-Item -Path $_.FullName -Destination $dst -Force }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $src; "Moved. Root now contains:"; \(Get-ChildItem -Force $dst | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name\) -join ", ")
